title: PUBLISH_KEY_PACKAGE: device_id validation uses chars().all() which is O(N) per UTF-8 char
description: ws.rs PUBLISH_KEY_PACKAGE: validates device_id with params.device_id.chars().all(...). chars() decodes UTF-8 on every character. Since device_id is supposed to be exactly 64 ASCII hex chars, it should check params.device_id.len() == 64 (byte length, O(1)) and then params.device_id.bytes().all(|b| matches!(b, b'0'..=b'9' | b'a'..=b'f')). The current code calls the same check for WHISPER recipient too. Minor but worth noting for consistency.
